---
name: Sprite data correction / new sprite
about: A sprite, variant, drop rate, ability or location is missing or wrong
title: "[Data] "
labels: data
---

**What's missing or incorrect?**
e.g. "New sprite added this Thursday", "Galaxy Demon drop rate is wrong", "Aura ability text is outdated".

**Sprite / variant**
Name and variant (Normal / Gold / Gummy / Galaxy / Gem / Holofoil / Rift).

**Correct value**
What it should be (ability, location, drop rate, rarity, summon cost…).

**Source (optional)**
Patch notes, fortnite.gg, or a screenshot confirming it.
